surfaceEvidence.criterionRef: Parse YAML code blocks in agents/roles/*.role.md and agents/examples/*-role.fixture.md with PyYAML
surfaceEvidence.exactInvocation: python3 - <<'PY' ... parse fenced yaml blocks with yaml.safe_load for agents/roles/*.role.md and agents/examples/*-role.fixture.md ... PY | tee .omo/evidence/adaptive-agent-doc-protocol-qa/qa-invariants.txt

surfaceEvidence.criterionRef: Confirm role_package contains required protocol fields
surfaceEvidence.exactInvocation: python3 - <<'PY' ... compare role_package keys against required protocol field list ... PY | tee .omo/evidence/adaptive-agent-doc-protocol-qa/qa-invariants.txt

surfaceEvidence.criterionRef: Confirm workflow_contract exists only in workflow files, not role files
surfaceEvidence.surface: terminal / parsed YAML top-level keys under agents/**/*.md
surfaceEvidence.exactInvocation: python3 - <<'PY' ... assert top-level workflow_contract only appears in agents/workflows/*.workflow.md and not role_package files ... PY | tee .omo/evidence/adaptive-agent-doc-protocol-qa/qa-invariants.txt

surfaceEvidence.criterionRef: Confirm current executable modes are only read/observe/dry_run/propose; no mode: apply or modes containing apply in current role/workflow surfaces
surfaceEvidence.surface: terminal / role and workflow Markdown YAML surfaces
surfaceEvidence.exactInvocation: python3 - <<'PY' ... parse capability_surface.surfaces[].modes and workflow task_graph[].mode, then regex scan mode: apply and modes: [...apply...] in role/workflow files ... PY | tee .omo/evidence/adaptive-agent-doc-protocol-qa/qa-invariants.txt

surfaceEvidence.criterionRef: Confirm concrete tenant adapter name appears only where allowed, not in shared protocol/base role files
surfaceEvidence.surface: terminal / agents/protocols/*.md and agents/roles/*.role.md text scan
surfaceEvidence.exactInvocation: python3 - <<'PY' ... scan disallowed shared protocol/base role files for jetpartner/jetpartners/jp ads/caylent/hermes/reports.30x.company/jetpartners/supabase qualified lead ... PY | tee .omo/evidence/adaptive-agent-doc-protocol-qa/qa-invariants.txt

surfaceEvidence.criterionRef: Confirm every agents/**/*.md file has the L3 [INPUT]/[OUTPUT]/[POS]/[PROTOCOL] header and every AGENTS.md has required [PROTOCOL] text
surfaceEvidence.exactInvocation: python3 - <<'PY' ... scan first 12 lines of every agents/**/*.md for [INPUT], [OUTPUT], [POS], [PROTOCOL]; separately scan all AGENTS.md for exact protocol text ... PY | tee .omo/evidence/adaptive-agent-doc-protocol-qa/qa-invariants.txt

surfaceEvidence.criterionRef: Safety invariant for scoped .omo/plans/adaptive-agent-review-board.zh-CN.html: current executable mode language must not expose apply as current mode
surfaceEvidence.surface: terminal / scoped HTML plan artifact text scan
surfaceEvidence.exactInvocation: python3 - <<'PY' ... scan .omo/plans/adaptive-agent-review-board.zh-CN.html lines containing apply and flag current-mode phrasing ... PY | tee .omo/evidence/adaptive-agent-doc-protocol-qa/qa-invariants.txt

adversarialCases.adversarialClass: malformed or missing fenced role YAML / missing required role_package fields
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: PyYAML parses every role and fixture block; role_package object exists with all required fields.

adversarialCases.adversarialClass: role file smuggles workflow_contract into role_package or top-level YAML
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: No role or fixture YAML contains workflow_contract; workflow files contain top-level workflow_contract.

adversarialCases.adversarialClass: live mutation enabled by mode: apply or modes containing apply in role/workflow surfaces
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Executable role/workflow modes are limited to read, observe, dry_run, propose.

adversarialCases.adversarialClass: tenant adapter/name or tenant truth leaks into shared protocol/base role files
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Shared protocol and base role files contain no concrete Jetpartner/Caylent/Hermes tenant terms.
Every agents/**/*.md has all four L3 tags in header; every AGENTS.md has exact [PROTOCOL] text.

adversarialCases.adversarialClass: review-board artifact presents apply as a currently exposed mode
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Scoped HTML must not describe apply as a current executable/exposed mode; apply may only be future/reserved.

artifactRefs.description: Full QA invariant run: PyYAML parsing, schema fields, workflow isolation, mode checks, tenant scans, GEB header scan, HTML apply scan.
Machine-readable QA summary with individual check verdicts and failure details.
Manual QA evidence matrix for final reporting.
